name: Full Stack Web Development
description: Complete end-to-end development of dynamic web applications using modern frameworks (e.g., React, Node.js, Python/Django). Includes database design and deployment.

name: Cloud Infrastructure Setup
description: Design and deployment of scalable cloud environments (AWS, Azure, or GCP). Focus on security, cost-optimization, and high availability (HA).

name: SEO Optimization & Strategy
description: Comprehensive search engine optimization audit, keyword research, content strategy, and on-page/off-page implementation to boost organic traffic.

name: Mobile App UI/UX Design
description: Wireframing, prototyping, and final design assets for native iOS and Android mobile applications, ensuring a user-centric experience.

name: Data Analytics Reporting
description: Creation of custom interactive dashboards (e.g., Power BI, Tableau) for key business metrics and monthly performance analysis.
